description: zrok is an open-source service for securely sharing local services and files over the internet using zero-trust networking. It is available as a hosted service through myzrok.io or as a self-hosted deployment.
summary: zrok.io exposes a documented `zrok2` CLI for the hosted zrok service; docs also reference an API console at `https://api-v2.zrok.io/`, but no public HTTP/GraphQL/MCP developer API spec or callable API documentation was found.
